author: lOrm
content: Applied Category A (root-cause) DRY refactor. Forensic findings: (1) proxy.rs:250-257 hand-built auth URL with stale scope list missing user:sessions:claude_code — replaced with pkce.build_auth_url(); (2) providers/anthropic.rs:272-274 embedded beta header literal inline — replaced with crate::claude_credentials::claude_code_beta_header_value(); (3) claude_credentials.rs get_oauth_headers used interpolated format string missing fine-grained-tool-streaming — replaced with same function. Added FINE_GRAINED_TOOL_STREAMING_BETA const and claude_code_beta_header_value() as the single source of truth. Three regression-guard tests added. Build: PASS (lib). Tests: 8/8 claude_credentials, 1/1 anthropic oauth_headers. Rustfmt: PASS.
